title: ALP project configuration (alp.yaml) v1
description: Schema for the per-project alp.yaml file that consumers place at their app root.  Declares the target SoM SKU, per-component assembly overrides, OS backend, inference backend, and optional library / feature enables.  The SDK's loader script (planned for v0.4) reads this file and emits Kconfig fragments (Zephyr), -D flags (plain CMake), or local.conf snippets (Yocto).  See docs/project-config.md.

schema_version.description: Schema revision.  Bumped only on breaking format changes.

sku.description: Stock SKU name.  Resolves to a preset under metadata/e1m_modules/<family>/sku-<sku>.yaml.  Currently recognised: E1M-AEN301/401/501/601/701/801 (Alif Ensemble family), E1M-V2N101/V2N102 (Renesas RZ/V2N), E1M-V2M101/V2M102 (V2N + DEEPX), E1M-NX9xxx (NXP i.MX 93, exact SKU TBD).

overrides.description: Per-component assembly deltas vs the stock SKU preset.  Use for custom variants (e.g. a derivative that DNI'd the IMU to cut BOM cost).

wifi_ble.description: Wi-Fi 6 + BLE 5.4 radio.  E1M-AEN uses on-module TI CC3501E; E1M-X V2N family uses on-module Murata LBEE5HY2FY (Infineon CYW55513).

imu.description: Inertial measurement unit on the SoM (or carrier).  Multiple IMUs may be populated on dev kits -- choose the one the application uses.

secure_element.description: Hardware secure element backing <alp/security.h>'s ECC + AES + TRNG path.

rtc_external.description: External RTC.  If 'none', the SoC-internal RTC is used.

ethernet.description: Wired Ethernet PHY population (RTL8211FDI-VD-CG on V2N).  Set to 'absent' on SoMs that don't route the GMAC pins.

memory.description: Memory subsystem capacities -- per-SKU presets fill these from the released parts list; overrides cover custom assemblies.

dram_mbit.description: LPDDR4X / LPDDR5X capacity in megabits (e.g. 32 Gbit = 32768).

flash_mbit.description: Boot flash capacity in megabits.  eMMC on V2N family, SPI-NAND on AEN.  E1M-AEN MRAM goes in mram_kbit instead.

mram_kbit.description: On-die MRAM capacity (Alif Ensemble only; ignored on V2N/N93).

os.description: Target OS backend.  Maps to ALP_OS in plain-CMake, to the prj.conf in Zephyr, to the MACHINE in Yocto.

inference.description: Inference backend selection.  Defaults pick the best available NPU on the SoM; explicit values override.

default_arena_kib.description: TFLM tensor arena size in KiB.  Apps override per-call via alp_inference_config_t.arena_bytes.

libraries.description: Optional libraries to make available to app code.  When listed, the SDK adds the library's include path + sources to the build; apps use the library through its native API (e.g. `#include "etl/vector.h"`), no <alp/...> wrapper.

iot.description: Connectivity feature toggles.  Enabling iot.wifi pulls in the Wi-Fi station path; iot.mqtt the MQTT client; iot.ble the Bluetooth host stack; iot.tls the MbedTLS-backed <alp/security.h> path.

last_error.description: Thread-local alp_last_error() slot.  Disable to save a few bytes of TLS on extremely-tight builds.

oneOf.description: Specific part number for a custom-populated variant.
